# Extended Edge Cases

## Hard Line Breaks

Line one with two trailing spaces  
Line two continues here.

## Setext Headings

Setext Level One
================

Setext Level Two
----------------

## Nested Blockquotes

> Outer blockquote.
>
> > Nested blockquote.
> >
> > Still nested.
>
> Back to outer.

## Empty Code Fence

```
```

## Code With Special Characters

Items with `#hash`, `@label`, `$dollar`, `[bracket]`, `{brace}`:

```python
data = {"key": "$value", "tag": "#tag"}
url = "https://example.com?q=test&lang=en"
```

## Link Edge Cases

[Link with title](https://example.com "hover title")

[](https://example.com)

[URL with query](https://api.example.com/v1?page=1&per_page=10&sort=asc)

## Table Edge Cases

| Column A | Column B |
|----------|----------|
| | empty first cell |
| data | |

| Only Header |
|-------------|

| Name | Code |
|------|------|
| Bold | `**bold**` |
| Link | [link](https://example.com) |

## Inline Emphasis Combinations

~~**bold strikethrough**~~

**outer *inner italic* outer bold**

*italic spanning multiple words in a phrase*

***triple emphasis***

## Heading Label Special Chars

## Hello, World! (Version 2.0)

## C++ Programming Language

## 100% Guaranteed

## List Items With Special Chars

- Price: $9.99 per unit
- Email: user@example.com
- Code: `#strong[text]`
- Path: C:\Users\name

## Math Edge Cases

Inline: $x_i$ and $a_{i j}$ and $E = m c^2$

Display:

$$\sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i = \bar{x} \cdot n$$

Subscript and superscript: $H_2 O$ and $e^{i pi} + 1 = 0$

## Very Long Words

Supercalifragilisticexpialidocious is extremely long.

A long URL that should not overflow: https://example.com/very/long/path/that/keeps/going/and/going/until/it/is/very/long/indeed

## Unicode Content

Chinese: 你好世界

Japanese: こんにちは

Arabic: مرحبا

Greek: αβγδεζηθ
